statement: Lloyds-specific deposit elasticity, customer journey ownership and executive accountability remain unresolved in the governed Banking corpus.
origin: Semantic Banking completion report and strategic sales navigation corpus
evidence_demand: Governed Lloyds account evidence identifying accountable executive roles and observed customer or deposit behaviour without inventing names or causality.
impact_description: Prevents stronger Lloyds-specific action, recommendation or scoring in Increment 1.
